title: nepeta denudata
intro: Nepeta denudata, also known as the Catmint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and essential oils. The health benefits of Nepeta denudata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Nepeta denudata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
